title: ricinocarpus glabratus
intro: Ricinocarpus glabratus is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as the smooth ricinocarpus. It is native to Australia, where its leaves and stems are traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and reducing fever. The leaves and stems of Ricinocarpus glabratus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in a carrier oil for topical use.
